enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request by naming his top favorite 'muscle chicks' — fit, muscular women he finds attractive and impressive. He discusses his criteria (hotness, documented strength, online presence, nudity) and names figures like Lindsey Cope, Sophie Arborverick, Cinderella, Rebecca Priscilla, Kit Tova, Allison Moyer, and CrossFit athletes like Camille LeBlanc-Bazinet. He digresses into preferences about body types, breast augmentation, and the idea that consuming fit imagery shapes one's own self-image and motivation.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: must be hot, well-documented online, demonstrably strong, and willing to get naked
prefers natural breasts; thinks large implants look covered-up and less sexy
not attracted to women who look masculine or excessively jacked from steroids
believes watching fit women online shapes your self-image and passively motivates you to stay fit
muscle chicks and athletes should document training regimens and strength benchmarks in detail — it's more valuable and interesting than just photos
